title: ballota acuta var. bullata
intro: Ballota acuta var. bullata, also known as Bullate Horehound, is a variety of the Ballota acuta plant, a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in relation to its essential oil, which contains menthol and other compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ballota acuta var. bullata include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat digestive problems and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and essential oil extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
